title: ITOCHU Announces Signing of Memorandum of Strategic Partnership for Decarbonization in the Transportation Sector
content: ITOCHU Corporation has signed a strategic partnership with Mitsui O.S.K. Lines to advance the use of environmental attribute certificates, with a strong focus on reducing aviation-related Scope 3 emissions through sustainable aviation fuel. ITOCHU is actively promoting SAF as a key solution for lowering emissions from air logistics and employee air travel, while MOL is advancing low-carbon marine fuels. By linking air and maritime transportation, the partnership creates a cross-industry framework that enables companies using transport services to reduce Scope 3 emissions in a transparent and reliable way. As part of the initiative, MOL purchased aviation environmental attribute certificates generated by ITOCHU to reduce emissions from employee air travel, demonstrating how SAF-linked certificates can support decarbonization using the 123Carbon platform.
author: Analysts Account
